name: brain-tumor-detection
description: Root scripts to run client and server together

scripts.install:server: python3 -m venv server/.venv && server/.venv/bin/pip install -r server/requirements.txt
scripts.setup: npm run install:client && npm run install:server
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,CLIENT -c green,cyan "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.start:server: server/.venv/bin/python -m gunicorn --chdir server wsgi:app --bind 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-5000} --timeout 300 || server/.venv/bin/python server/main.py
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n SERVER,CLIENT -c green,cyan "npm run start:server" "npm run start:client"
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && concurrently -k -n SERVER,CLIENT -c green,cyan "npm run start:server:prod" "npm run start:client:prod"
